title: listrostachys arcuata
intro: Listrostachys arcuata, also known as Chinchawasmu, is a type of flowering plant native to the Andean region. The medicinal properties of Listrostachys arcuata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems, as well as its potential to have anti-cancer properties. Listrostachys arcuata is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it is also used in herbal preparations to create tonics and remedies for various health conditions.
